help.telnyx.enabled: Enable the Telnyx integration for SMS and voice calls. The agent can send/receive SMS and make phone calls.
help.telnyx.read_only: When active, the agent can only receive messages but cannot send SMS or initiate calls.
help.telnyx.api_key: Your Telnyx API v2 key. Stored securely in the encrypted vault.
help.telnyx.phone_number: Your Telnyx phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +15551234567).
help.telnyx.messaging_profile_id: Telnyx Messaging Profile ID for sending SMS/MMS.
help.telnyx.connection_id: Telnyx Connection ID (TeXML App or Call Control App) for voice calls.
help.telnyx.webhook_path: URL path where Telnyx delivers webhook events. Must match your Telnyx portal settings.
help.telnyx.allowed_numbers: Comma-separated list of phone numbers (E.164) that may interact with the agent. Leave empty to allow all.
help.telnyx.call_timeout: Maximum call duration in seconds before automatic hangup (30–3600).
help.telnyx.record_calls: Automatically record all voice calls. Recordings are stored and accessible to the agent.
help.telnyx.relay_to_agent: Forward incoming SMS and call transcriptions to the agent loop for processing.
